properties.name: sdp.logging.access.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable access log interceptor.

properties.name: sdp.logging.access.include-query-string
properties.description: Whether to include query string in access logs.

properties.name: sdp.logging.access.db-enabled
properties.description: Whether to persist selected access logs to database.

properties.name: sdp.logging.access.exclude-paths
properties.description: Excluded request paths for access logging.

properties.name: sdp.logging.access.db-include-paths
properties.description: Request path patterns that should be persisted to database.

properties.name: sdp.logging.file.path
properties.description: Base directory for rolling log files.

properties.name: sdp.logging.file.max-file-size
properties.description: Maximum size per rolled log file.

properties.name: sdp.logging.file.total-size-cap
properties.description: Total disk cap for rolled log files.

properties.name: sdp.logging.archive.enabled
properties.description: Whether periodic log archive cleanup is enabled.

properties.name: sdp.logging.archive.cron
properties.description: Cron expression of archive cleanup task.
